creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-22 19:06:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/repos-style      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/repos-style/files patch-open-log-index.php 
                          patch-view-log.xsl patch-view-repos.xsl 
                          pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  net2ftp is a web-based FTP client written in PHP
  
  User features
   - Navigate the FTP server
   - Upload files
   - Download files
   - Zip files
   - Unzip files
   - Install software
   - Copy, move and delete
   - Copy or move to a 2nd FTP server
   - Rename and chmod
   - View code with syntax highlighting
   - Plain text editor
   - HTML editors
   - Code editor
   - Search for words or phrases
   - Calculate size
  
  WWW: http://www.net2ftp.com/
  
  PR:             ports/137868
  Submitted by:   Alexander Kriventsov
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2427    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
